title: Frostyy's Deadly Sentencing Addon
description: A addon for Jujutsu Kaisen Cursed Fate mod which adds Higuruma's Deadly Sentencing Cursed Technique.
body:
**Ability 1**: **Judgeman**; Summons Judgeman which is a Shikigami which makes those near it, unable to use Cursed Energy, due to the powers of his court (Also includes the player, its a set up to using the Deadly Gavel item for combat).

**Ability 2**: **Slam Dash**; Dash into enemies and commit a slam attack.

**Ability 3**: **Twirling Blows**; Can do a simple gavel attack which can be spammed to combine into a combo attack to finish off your enemies.

**Ability 4**: **Hammer of Justice**; Conjures a giant gavel that stuns opponents for two seconds.

**Ability 5**: **Gavel Throw**; Creates and launches gavels that when hit, prevents your enemies from using Cursed Energy (For 6 seconds).

**_Ability 6_**: **Deadly Sentencing**; For exactly 6.7 seconds, the user is given the Executioner Sword which allows them to instantly kill any enemy in their way (After one use, the sword is destroyed).

Planned Updates: 
1. Add Deadly Gavel Item (On right click will be able to change to different forms; Simple, Titanic, and Sweeper. Simple goes to Sweeper, Sweeper goes to Titanic, and Titanic goes to Simple). Simple is just a basic gavel that doesn't affect the moves. Sweeper is a long handle gavel that gives move range and slight stun. Titanic is a giant gavel that does more damage and slight stun.
2. Add variants to moves 3-5 based on the gavel type you are holding (example of how it will affect the moves shown in planned update number 1).
3. Will change Gavel Throw vfx based off of gavel you are holding.
   
If you want more Cursed Fate addons like this one, join my discord. I am always looking for help on making these amazing techniques, so just DM me. Btw Vinsmoke is the next technique I am making.

Youtube Channel: FrostyyYT
Discord Server: Seven Seas Events

Credits:
Frostyy: Coder, Modeler
FamineTrench: Main Modeler
Termos: Main Artist
